message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: My feature: add domain parameter support to trans tag (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables) in src/jinja2/ext.py. This is the only file I need to touch. What file(s) does your feature need? If you also need ext.py, let's coordinate on non-overlapping sections or a merge order.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: I'm implementing: Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag (note/created/modified params in InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node()). This touches src/jinja2/ext.py - let me know what you're touching so we can coordinate a disjoint edit region or ordering.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Same file, both needed - true disjoint split isn't possible. Proposal: you go first since your feature (domain param) is more self-contained; finish and send DONE. I'll then pull the current state of ext.py, layer my metadata (note/created/modified) additions on top in parse()/_make_node() without touching your domain logic, and send my own DONE. Sound good? If you'd rather go second, say so and I'll go first instead.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Same file needed by both, true file-level split isn't possible. Let's keep edits additive/non-overlapping: I'll add domain= parsing as an independent optional token check in parse() (separate variable domain, separate branch in _make_node for dgettext/dngettext, separate entry in _install_callables). Please do the same for note/created/modified so our diffs touch disjoint lines where possible. I'm proceeding with my implementation now in my own workspace copy; will send DONE when finished.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
your_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Agreed - I'll implement note/created/modified metadata as additive, independent branches in parse()/_make_node(), keeping lines disjoint from your domain= work where possible. Proceeding now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished domain support: added domain="string" parsing in parse() (rejects duplicates and non-string-literal values with TemplateAssertionError), dgettext/dngettext node generation in _make_node(), _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext helpers, and dgettext/dngettext wiring in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall. All edits are additive (new branches/params), shouldn't structurally conflict with note/created/modified additions as long as you also thread your params through as additional optional args. Full test suite (830 tests) passes on my end.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/ext.py
note: Finished metadata support: note/created/modified parsing in parse() (metadata dict, requires string-literal assignment, TemplateAssertionError on missing-assignment or non-string-literal), fixed comma-tracking (variables or metadata) so metadata mixes correctly with vars/trimmed in any order, and _make_node() now takes metadata param and sets output_node.trans_metadata only when non-empty. Full suite (830 tests) passes on my end.
